summary: Comprehensive testing of Recipe Version History (Audit Trail) feature completed. All 12 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verification confirmed all history buttons and dialog functionality working correctly across RecipesTab (list and report views) and ProductionTab.
seed_data_creation: Test recipes created with TEST_AUDIT_ prefix and cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Recipe Audit History feature fully implemented and tested. Key findings: 1) GET /api/recipes/{id}/history returns audit logs sorted by timestamp desc, 2) GET /api/recipes/history/all works with filters (recipe_name, action, user_name, limit), 3) POST creates audit with action='created', 4) PUT creates audit with action='updated' and detailed changes diff, 5) DELETE creates audit with action='deleted' and snapshot_before, 6) Sub-recipe protection still works (DELETE without force returns 400), 7) UI shows cyan clock history buttons in RecipesTab list view, margin report view, and ProductionTab for sub-recipes with defined recipes, 8) RecipeHistoryDialog shows timeline with action badges (Creada=green, Modificada=blue, Eliminada=red), user info, timestamps, and expandable snapshots

backend_api.GET /api/recipes/{id}/history: PASS - Returns audit history for specific recipe, sorted by timestamp desc
backend_api.GET /api/recipes/history/all: PASS - Returns all recipe history with optional filters (recipe_name, action, user_name, limit)
backend_api.POST /api/recipes - audit log: PASS - Creates audit entry with action='created' and snapshot_after
backend_api.PUT /api/recipes/{id} - audit log: PASS - Creates audit entry with action='updated', detailed changes diff, snapshot_before and snapshot_after
backend_api.DELETE /api/recipes/{id} - audit log: PASS - Creates audit entry with action='deleted' and snapshot_before preserved
backend_api.sub-recipe protection: PASS - DELETE without force=true returns 400 for sub-recipes
backend_api.history sorting: PASS - Entries sorted by timestamp descending (newest first)
backend_api.user info in audit: PASS - Entries contain user_id and user_name from JWT token
backend_api.diff_ingredients function: PASS - Tracks added, removed, modified ingredients with detailed descriptions

frontend_ui.RecipesTab list view history button: PASS - Cyan clock icon visible for each recipe card (data-testid='history-recipe-{id}')
frontend_ui.RecipesTab report view history button: PASS - Cyan clock icon in Acción column (data-testid='history-margin-{id}')
frontend_ui.ProductionTab history button: PASS - Cyan clock icon for sub-recipes with defined recipes (data-testid='history-ok-{id}' or 'history-urgent-{id}')
frontend_ui.RecipeHistoryDialog timeline: PASS - Shows timeline with action badges, user name, timestamps
frontend_ui.RecipeHistoryDialog snapshots: PASS - Expandable 'Ver estado anterior' and 'Ver estado nuevo' sections
frontend_ui.RecipeHistoryDialog close: PASS - Cerrar button closes dialog properly

test_data_in_db.audit_logs_found: Yes - PRESIDENTE has 'Modificada' entry from 28 feb 2026 12:25 a.m.
